headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -150.6)
key_insights: Frustrations trending up 27% over 7 days (strong momentum)
Alert: Overall sentiment has significantly decreased (z=-3.16)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 105 quotes, driven by an overwhelming 132 strong-intensity comments - people are really angry today.
• This frustration level sits in the upper portion of the 137-day range, showing significantly elevated discontent.
• Fears rebounded strongly from yesterday's low while optimism sank deeper into negative territory.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
